<final_evaluation>
{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "6, ['Mention of specific neighborhood names like Liberty Village or Danforth Village which are not enumerated in location_neighborhood list', 'Description of amenities such as gym, concierge, rooftop lounge, or visitor parking which are not covered by any template field', 'Offer to provide or discuss a “security compliance and advanced legal clearance package” for smart home data protection which is beyond defined legal or service packages', 'Reference to “smart office readiness” and “security clearance–related configurations” not representable in special_features or service_packages', 'Incentives like lender fast‑track approval or immediate ownership transfer which do not map to financing_options fields', 'Offer to combine Premium + Rush legal packages or request for provisional compliance timeline which are not expressible within the fixed service_packages or timeline_coordination schema']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "15, ['Property listings with type, price, size, bedrooms, bathrooms, taxes, maintenance fees, and location region', 'Availability status and viewing windows for each property', 'Viewing coordination including specific dates, times, and duration', 'Identification of smart_home and energy_efficient features (mapped to special_features)', 'Information requests about whether to shortlist or request additional properties', 'Booking confirmations for scheduled property viewings', 'Status updates indicating confirmation details will be sent', 'Financing options including mortgage, cash, and hybrid methods with interest rates, closing costs, and timelines', 'Mention of purchase_method (cash or mortgage) and closing_costs in financing_options', 'Legal service packages (basic, premium, rush) with cost, duration, and service_level', 'Property survey and inspection services with cost and duration', 'Moving service levels (standard, premium, white_glove) with cost and timeline', 'Utility setup packages (basic, premium) with included services and setup timeline', 'Timeline coordination mentioning Q1 2025 or completion window extensions', 'Offer to prepare combined package quote and summarize costs under total_package_summary']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>
